title: 9. The patient is unloaded. > 2.5.3.1 Control System Safety Infrastructure > 2.5.3.1.2 System Integrity Check > 2.5.3.1.2.1 Startup Integrity Check
text_content: All configuration data content in a configuration file (config.xml and default.xml) is protected by its content CRC and is verified every time a configuration file or default file is loaded. The CRC of config.xml is also compared with the workstation’s master copy of the CRC to ensure the configuration is in sync on both the workstation and the subsystem. When a subsystem starts up, it asserts an interlock before it receives the workstation CRC, and releases the interlock after it receives the workstation CRC. All critical binary files are protected against tampering using CRC. The list of files and their CRC are specified in the configuration file and are prepared dynamically for each release.
